sentences.target: Je te transmets le contact de Julie.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tə tʁɑ̃smɛ lə kɔ̃takt də ʒyli/

translations.fr: Je te transmets le contact de Julie.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tə tʁɑ̃smɛ lə kɔ̃takt də ʒyli/
translations.es: Te envío el contacto de Julie.
translations.it: Ti mando il contatto di Julie.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把朱莉的联系方式发给你。
translations.pt: Vou te enviar o contato da Julie.
translations.he: אני שולח לך את פרטי הקשר של ג'ולי.
translations.vi: Mình gửi cho bạn thông tin liên hệ của Julie.
translations.ar: أرسل لك معلومات الاتصال الخاصة بجولي.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें जूली का संपर्क भेज रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σου στέλνω τα στοιχεία επικοινωνίας της Julie.
translations.nb: Jeg sender deg kontaktinformasjonen til Julie.
translations.id: Aku kirim kontak Julie ke kamu.
translations.ro: Îți trimit datele de contact ale lui Julie.
translations.ja: ジュリーの連絡先を送ります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun; grammatical subject of the verb.
2nd person singular clitic object pronoun; here an indirect object (recipient) of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; governs a direct object ('le contact') and an indirect object ('te').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'contact'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'transmets'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement indicating possession/source ('de Julie').
Proper noun (given name); object of the preposition 'de' (possessor).

sentences.target: Tu peux transmettre le message au voisin.
sentences.reading: /ty pø tʁɑ̃smɛtʁ lə mesaʒ o vwazɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu peux transmettre le message au voisin.
translations.ipa: /ty pø tʁɑ̃smɛtʁ lə mesaʒ o vwazɛ̃/
translations.en: You can pass the message to the neighbor.
translations.es: Puedes pasarle el mensaje al vecino.
translations.de: Du kannst die Nachricht dem Nachbarn weitergeben.
translations.it: Puoi passare il messaggio al vicino.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把消息转告给邻居。
translations.yue: 你可以同鄰居講返個訊息。
translations.pt: Você pode repassar a mensagem para o vizinho.
translations.he: אתה יכול להעביר את ההודעה לשכן.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể chuyển lời nhắn cho hàng xóm.
translations.nl: Je kunt de boodschap aan de buur doorgeven.
translations.hu: Át tudod adni az üzenetet a szomszédnak.
translations.hi: तुम पड़ोसी को संदेश पहुँचा सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να μεταφέρεις το μήνυμα στον γείτονα.
translations.nb: Du kan gi beskjeden videre til naboen.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menyampaikan pesan ke tetangga.
translations.sv: Du kan ge meddelandet vidare till grannen.
translations.da: Du kan give beskeden videre til naboen.
translations.ja: 隣の人にメッセージを伝えられます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'peux'.
Main/modal verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; takes an infinitival complement ('transmettre').
Infinitive verb; complement of 'peux'; selects a direct object and an indirect object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'message'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'transmettre'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces an indirect object phrase ('au voisin').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (via 'au').

sentences.target: Elle transmet les résultats au chef.

translations.fr: Elle transmet les résultats au chef.
translations.en: She’s sending the results to the boss.
translations.es: Ella envía los resultados al jefe.
translations.de: Sie übermittelt die Ergebnisse an den Chef.
translations.pt: Ela envia os resultados para o chefe.
translations.vi: Cô ấy gửi kết quả cho sếp.
translations.nl: Ze stuurt de resultaten naar de baas.
translations.hu: Ő elküldi az eredményeket a főnöknek.
translations.hi: वह परिणाम बॉस को भेज रही है.
translations.ja: 彼女は結果を上司に送っています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'transmet'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object and an indirect object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'résultats'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'transmet'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing the recipient phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition (recipient).

sentences.target: Nous vous transmettons les photos ce soir.
sentences.reading: /nu vu tʁɑ̃smɛtɔ̃ le fɔto sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Nous vous transmettons les photos ce soir.
translations.ipa: /nu vu tʁɑ̃smɛtɔ̃ le fɔto sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We’ll send you the photos tonight.
translations.es: Te enviamos las fotos esta noche.
translations.de: Wir schicken dir die Fotos heute Abend.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚把照片发给你。
translations.yue: 我哋今晚會將相片傳畀你。
translations.ru: Мы пришлём вам фотографии сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Vamos lhe enviar as fotos hoje à noite.
translations.he: אנחנו נשלח לך את התמונות הערב.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi sẽ gửi cho bạn ảnh.
translations.nl: We sturen je de foto's vanavond.
translations.uk: Ми надішлемо вам фото сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Ma este elküldjük neked a képeket.
translations.hi: हम आपको आज रात तस्वीरें भेजेंगे.
translations.el: Θα σου στείλουμε τις φωτογραφίες απόψε.
translations.nb: Vi sender deg bildene i kveld.
translations.id: Kami akan mengirimkan foto-foto itu malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi skickar dig bilderna i kväll.
translations.da: Vi sender dig billederne i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜、写真をお送りします。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'transmettons'.
2nd person plural/polite clitic object pronoun; indirect object (recipient) of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes a direct object and an indirect object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'photos'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'transmettons'.
Demonstrative determiner in the time expression 'ce soir' ('this evening/tonight').
Common noun, masculine singular; used adverbially as a time complement.
